title: symphytum × perringianum
intro: Symphytum × perringianum, also known as Perring's comfrey, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is a cross between Symphytum asperum and Symphytum ibericum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Symphytum × perringianum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, promote wound healing, and support bone health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and creams, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including arthritis, muscle soreness, and skin conditions.
